channel.title: Posts on CFD blog
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on CFD blog

item.title: Connect: Meet the World, One Conversation at a Time
item.description: A free, browser-based way to talk to strangers — anonymously, instantly, and on your terms. Text or video. No signup required.

item.title: JSON Explorer: A Free Browser Playground for JSON, Data Formats, and Quick Experiments
item.description: JSON Explorer is a free, no-sign-up browser tool to explore JSON, run JavaScript against your data, convert between formats, and decode JWTs — all without leaving your tab.

item.title: Play Together, Anywhere: Introducing CodeFry Online Games
item.description: Free browser games with friends — no download, no account, no hassle. Chess, Chain Reaction, Ludo, and more with local, AI, and online multiplayer.

item.title: Site Audit: A Self-Hosted, Developer-Friendly SEO Platform I Built (and Open-Sourced)
item.description: Crawl your sites, triage issues, connect Search Console, and export client reports — on infrastructure you control.

item.title: Website Resolution Tester: Preview Your Site on Any Screen Size—Instantly
item.description: A free, browser-based tool to preview any website at exact device viewport sizes. Device presets from iPhone 4 to iPhone 17, batch testing, localhost support, and shareable links.
